value.body: A growing ecosystem of intelligent SaaS products designed to streamline workflows, optimize growth, and redefine the standard of modern enterprise tools.
value.imageAlt: Abstract 3D architectural render with glowing amber nodes and sleek metallic surfaces representing neural network architecture

value.label: About Us
value.heading: We build the tools that build the future.
value.body: Intelligence Tech is a product-driven technology company building a connected ecosystem of SaaS tools designed for the modern enterprise. Our platform shares a singular intelligence layer that makes every tool smarter — together.

pillars.title: Our Mission
pillars.desc: To democratize intelligent software — making enterprise-grade tools accessible to teams of every size.

pillars.title: Our Vision
pillars.desc: A world where every business decision is powered by interconnected, self-optimizing software systems.

pillars.title: Our Culture
pillars.desc: Remote-first, builder-focused, and deeply committed to shipping products that people genuinely love.

value.tagline: Building the software layer for the next generation of digital enterprise.

value.heading: Let's talk.
value.body: Whether you have a question about our products, need a demo, or want to explore partnership opportunities — we'd love to hear from you.

value.intro: At Intelligence Tech, protecting your privacy is fundamental to our mission. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.

items.title: Information you provide
items.body: Account details, contact information, and any content you submit through our platform.

items.title: Usage information
items.body: How you interact with our services, including pages visited, features used, and time spent.

items.title: Cookies & tracking
items.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences and improve experience.

items.title: Log data
items.body: Server logs that include IP address, browser type, and referring pages.

sections.title: How we use information
items: To provide, maintain, and improve our services
To communicate with you about updates and changes
To detect and prevent fraud or abuse

sections.title: How we share information
sections.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:
items: Service providers who assist in operations
Legal authorities when required by law

sections.title: Data retention & security
sections.body: We retain your data only as long as necessary for the purposes outlined in this policy. We employ industry-standard encryption, access controls, and monitoring to protect your information.

sections.title: Your choices & rights
sections.body: You can access, update, or delete your account information at any time. You may opt out of marketing communications. Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have additional rights under GDPR, CCPA, or similar regulations.
